name: Research Collaboration Network ER with Self-Referential Relationships
input: Create an ER diagram for a research collaboration tracking database. Entities: Researcher (researcher_id PK, name, orcid, h_index, institution), Publication (pub_id PK, title, doi, journal, year, impact_factor), Grant (grant_id PK, title, agency, amount, start_date, end_date), Institution (inst_id PK, name, country, type). Relationships: Researcher writes Publication (many-to-many, with author_order attribute). Researcher receives Grant (many-to-many, with role: PI/Co-PI/Consultant). Researcher belongs to Institution (many-to-one). Researcher mentors Researcher (self-referential, one-to-many: mentor to mentees). Publication cites Publication (self-referential many-to-many). Grant funds Publication (one-to-many). Show all cardinalities.
qualityCriteria: All 4 entities present (Researcher, Publication, Grant, Institution)
Researcher entity has at least 3 attributes (name, orcid, h_index)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: ER diagram with 4 entities, 2 self-referential relationships, many-to-many with attributes, full cardinalities.
